content.query:
SELECT
    taxi_zone.Borough,
    COUNT(1) AS total_trips
    FROM
        OPENROWSET(
            BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/',
            DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
            FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
        ) AS trip_data
    JOIN
        OPENROWSET(
            BULK 'raw/taxi_zone.csv',
            DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
            FORMAT = 'CSV',
            HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
            PARSER_VERSION = '2.0')
        WITH (
        LocationID SMALLINT,
        Borough VARCHAR(15),
        Zone VARCHAR(50),
        service_zone VARCHAR(15)
        ) AS taxi_zone
    ON trip_data.PULocationID = taxi_zone.LocationID
    GROUP BY taxi_zone.Borough
    ORDER BY total_trips DESC
